messages.body: Hello Annyah, I hope you are doing well!

Hi Annyah, I hope you are doing well!  Your refund has been raised and is currently processing. You should see it reflected in your account within five business days. If there's anything else I can help you with, please …
I understand your concerns completely. I've escalated this to our finance team and will have an update for you by tomorrow morning. We'll work to find the best solution for you.

Hi ok please let me know when the redund will get back to me becaus i have stuff to pay for . I had told you i could no longer go on with the subscriptions please remove me from the subscriptions immediately i cant have …
I hope you are doing well.
I firstly apologize for the delayed response over the weekend as our office was closed.
Regarding to your message above, I have raised a refund request to my finance team.
I will keep you posted for the same Annyah.
Please don’t worry.
Hello Annyah, Good Morning!
Good morning i did not authorize you guys to take thah money from my account ! I made that clear on October 20th. I need a refund asap!
Hey Annyah
Can I have a quick conversation over a phone call now?
It was lovely talking to you. I will wait for your response. :)

Hello. Hello. Hello. Hi. Hi. How are you? This is Kanak from Zoka. How are you? I'm... Hello. I can't hear you. One moment. Okay. Can you hear me? Yes, I can hear you. How are you doing? I'm good. How are you? I'm doing …
Let me talk to my team and get back to you soon. We're in this together, and I'm committed to making this work for you!

One thing I did notice though - I see several leads marked as "not booked" or "unresponsive." I'd love to understand what happened there. Did the clients mention why they didn't book? Understanding this will help us make…

I understand my profile may have gotten leads and I hate to leave at the moment but i cant afford it right now even with a discount . I have already budgetted and set my funds aside for the important bills i have coming …

Let me share something with you - we predicted 17 leads over 6 months, and you've already received 26 leads! That's way beyond what we projected, and your profile is performing really strong on the backend.

Let me go back to my finance team and see if we can work something out for you. Maybe a discount for November and December, or possibly even a waiver for one of the months. I want to make sure your profile keeps running …
Hi Good morning , I just marked the one that was there “Toya” as not booked because i messaged her and she did not need any service

Hi Annyah! I completely understand where you're coming from - financial challenges can be really stressful, especially during the holiday season. But here's what I want you to know: your profile is doing incredibly well …

Hi Kanak. I’m hust letting you know i will have to cancel for the month of November and December. I can’t afford the services next month so please dont pull the money from my card. I will maybe start back using services …
